# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

A reviewed session compaction note contains one reusable practice, one bounded Codex workflow, and one broader recurring rollout route, and we need to decide which AoA owner layer each belongs in before drafting the smallest honest next artifacts.

## Expected selection

use

## Why

The source is already a reviewed session artifact, several reusable units may exist, and the main task is owner-layer routing plus smallest-next-artifact drafting rather than final triage for one repeated quest unit.

## Expected object

A donor harvest pack that names each reusable unit, its owner layer, the next artifact, and the nearest wrong target.

## Boundary notes

Use this skill when a reviewed session needs donor extraction across multiple candidate units. Do not collapse reusable practice, bounded workflows, and scenario routes into one bucket.

## Verification hooks

The response should separate the units cleanly, map each one to one primary owner layer, and name a concrete next artifact for each accepted candidate.
